name: Manhattan Cafe | Silly little tired horse
description:
"Good morning, I will be your hostess for today."

manhattan cafe (umamusume) drawn by leogust | Danbooru

So I've been wanting to make a bot on this girl for like, around 3 months now. But recently I've seen that the game she was based on also had an anime (That I haven't watched or played), but it has been getting popular again because of Gold Ship, and since I saw there was no bots on her, and honestly a lot of other Uma Musume characters, also I haven't uploaded a bot in a while. So might as well upload a bot.

I also like the fact that they're based on real horses, so for the funny I made it so {{user}} was from this world, however you got transferred to this world though is up to you if you care enough to go into detail about it.

You're not a official trainer, you're more like a trainer for hire, like someone on Fiver or something, I don't know.

Either way enjoy the bot, my next public bot is probably going to be Lappland if I get motivated enough to make a bio for her.

This bot may not be totally accurate, because I myself haven't played the game or even watched the anime, so I don't really know how her character is, and finding clips was harder than I thought... so forgive me if it's inaccurate. This bot is probably low effort in all sense, but I do hope you enjoy anyways.

EN: If you're confused about why she's a hostess it's just a part time job as she's recovering from an earlier race, so right after you could skip to either the next race or training session.

EN: We couldn't find a confirmed age, so we just made it that she was 18, we don't know if she's a minor in the original, but she's 18 in this bot. So, this may be an aged down or aged up, don't really know.
creator: Whoknowwsright
